aboutMe.title: About Me
aboutMe.description: My name is Lucas Ricardo Barbosa. I hold a degree in Systems Analysis and Development and have been building my career in software development, primarily as a full-stack developer. I have experience working with technologies such as React, Node.js, TypeScript, Next.js, React Native, and many others.

buildTogether.title: Let’s Build Something Together
buildTogether.description: If you have a project in mind or enjoyed my work, feel free to send me a message.

aboutMe.intro1: My name is Lucas, I hold a degree in Systems Analysis and Development, and I am 22 years old.
aboutMe.intro2: I am a Front-End Developer with around 2 years of experience working with technologies such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, ReactJS, Next.js, Git, GitHub, and much more.
aboutMe.intro3: Throughout my journey as a front-end and full-stack developer, I have gained experience working with agile methodologies such as Scrum and Kanban. I am ready to contribute my expertise in JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, and Node.js to your team.
aboutMe.intro4: I am driven by challenges and constantly looking for new ways to improve my skills and expand my knowledge.
aboutMe.academicDescription: I graduated in Systems Analysis and Development, where I had the opportunity to learn everything from programming fundamentals to building complete applications. It was a period of growth and experimentation, where I worked on practical projects and strengthened my passion for creating technology solutions that truly make an impact.
aboutMe.personalInterestsDescription: Outside of work, I have a strong passion for music, which is part of my daily life and often inspires me during programming sessions. I also enjoy football and video games, which I see as great ways to relax while keeping my mind active. These activities help balance my routine by bringing moments of creativity and enjoyment.

I also enjoy football and video games, which I see as great ways to relax while keeping my mind active. These activities help balance my routine by bringing moments of creativity and enjoyment.

stacks.description: This page showcases the main technologies I have been learning and using.

setup.description: This is a list of the equipment and tools I use in my daily workflow. It also includes products and gear that I personally recommend. As I continue upgrading my setup, I’ll keep this list updated as well.
